rationale: Gov't Code §2306.0504 governs debarment from Texas Department of Housing and Community Affairs programs. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). The proposed increase in the homestead exemption amount does not affect or conflict with this debarment provision.
quote: The department shall develop, and the board by rule shall adopt, a policy providing for the debarment of a person from participation in programs administered by the department.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule concerns TDHCA program debarment; the proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amounts. No statutory or operational overlap exists.
